title: Merge TikTok Gravity Knife
description: This is an addictive elimination merge puzzle game. If you like synthetic elimination games, then this game is for you. They can remove a portion of the weapons that didn't merge, but there's only one free shot. Be careful, you have to score as many points as possible within the time limit, otherwise, you will have to start another game. Now join the challenging world of the game.

title: cowz.io
description: Cowz.io is a chaotic action game where you battle corrupted farm animals in the once-peaceful fields of Killshire Farms. As a lone hero, you’ll slash through waves of possessed cows, gather powerful loot, and unravel bizarre secrets hidden in a land twisted by dark magic.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Cooking Empire
description: Cooking Empire is not just a cooking game, it’s a real explosion of flavors and speed! Start frying, boiling, baking and serving dishes from all over the world with one click! Are you ready to become a chef the whole world will remember?

title: Limited Defense
description:
Limited Defense is a strategic tower defense game where you command bandits, archers, and explosive towers to hold back relentless waves of enemies. Face off against mischievous Green Slimes, fearsome Orcs, and towering bosses like the Boss King Slime. Upgrade your defenses, unlock legendary warriors, and test your tactical skills in intense, fast-paced battles!
Can you make it in this tower defense game?

title: Noob: Saving friends
description:
"Noob: Saving friends" - An adventure in an interesting and captivating world with Nubik.

Together with Nubik, you will mine and sell ores, buy new pickaxes, upgrade skills, and try to uncover all the secrets! Will you be able to challenge the dragon and earn the maximum coins? Or maybe luck from the lucky block will smile upon you?

title: Delta Force Airborne
description:
This game offers a whole new level of graphics and sound design that completely immerses you in a realistic atmosphere of battles. 
Shoot and use tactical thinking to overcome obstacles and achieve victory together with your team. 
Explore a variety of maps, each of which is full of unique opportunities and strategic points.
Become a master of team play by coordinating with your teammates and using different character classes to create the perfect strategy.

title: Block Builder Jam
description: Block Builder Jam is a physics-based puzzle game that blends logic with creativity. Your goal is to drop blocks and fit them into the outlined shape on the screen. Each block falls according to real physics, so precision and timing matter. As levels progress, shapes become more complex and demand sharper planning. With its simple mechanics and engaging challenges, Block Builder Jam offers a satisfying mix of strategy and experimentation.

title: Arrow Puzzle
description: Arrow Puzzle is a relaxing logic game that turns simple taps into a rewarding challenge. Your goal is straightforward: find a free path, tap arrows in the right order, and enjoy as the maze slowly turns into a clear, empty board. Follow the arrows to escape the puzzle and find a soothing flow that keeps your mind engaged and relaxed.

title: Fish Kingdom
description: Our game will show you in all the beauty of the real sea world. A world in which life is booming, because it is inhabited by sea creatures, mermaids, shells, plankton and many other amazing creatures of the sea world!

title: Tap Car
description:
Unveil stunning car masterpieces by solving image puzzles. Every tap reveals more of the picture—can you uncover them all? A must-play for car enthusiasts and puzzle lovers alike!

Would you like a few more variations depending on the tone you're aiming for (like more casual, exciting, or elegant)?

title: Europe at War
description:
Europe stands on the brink of the greatest conflict in history. It's 1936 - choose your nation and decide the fate of the continent.
Europe at War is a turn-based strategy with a detailed map of Europe divided into 369 regions. Manage your economy, build factories and barracks, research technologies, forge alliances or declare wars.
Three paths to victory: conquer all regions by force, unite Europe through diplomatic alliances, or build an industrial empire of 12 factories.

title: Cat Mini Restaurant
description: In this heartwarming and healing simulation management game "Meow Flavor Restaurant", you will become a little cat owner who loves cooking and personally create your own dream restaurant. Starting from a small cat house kitchen, gradually upgrading equipment, developing new recipes, recruiting cute cat employees, until becoming the most popular internet celebrity restaurant in the city! More than 30 cats with different personalities and skills are waiting for you to collect!

title: Blocks Stack Rush
description: Enjoy an addictive stacking adventure. In Blocks Stack Rush, you’ll control a little block character running and begin a fun pixelated journey. Collect blocks, stack them high and race against time to build the perfect picture. You need to align each block and keep putting together the complete picture.

title: Cop Run 3d
description: Cop Run 3D is an arcade-style parkour game that brings you on an exciting chase adventure! In this 3D game world, you'll play as a cop, running and jumping through the city streets. Avoid obstacles, and collect various rewards! The gameplay is simple yet fun. Use your agility to jump the fence, avoid spikes, and collect coins.

title: Thread Match 2
description:
Thread Match 2 is a satisfying logic puzzle game that combines color matching, layered challenges, and calming embroidery visuals.

Solve clever thread puzzles by planning the correct order of moves and dismantling complex constructions. Each level challenges your brain with blocked and unlocked elements, where strategy and attention matter more than speed.

title: Color Conquest: Territory War
description:
Command one of 4 unique factions in this intense RTS war! Capture territories to expand your army and destroy enemy bases.

Factions:

Grey: High HP (Tank), slow production.

Green: Fast spawn (Swarm), low HP.

Blue & Yellow: Balanced fighters.

Capture neutral zones to increase your unit capacity. Can you dominate the map?

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: Ballistic Breakthrough
description: explore lush scenes, tackle tricky obstacles, and unlock upgrades. Every level blends fun challenges with strategic boosts

title: Chroma Tower
description: Chroma Tower is a reverse-Tetris puzzle where you destroy instead of build! You're given a tower made of colored blocks. Drop blocks from above, match the color — and the entire connected chain disappears. Blocks fall to fill the gaps, potentially triggering new cascade reactions. Your goal is to demolish the tower completely within a limited number of moves.

title: Idle PinBall - Merge Clicker
description: Welcome to an exciting mobile game for those who love to combine elements and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Minimalistic 3D graphics, dynamic combinations and the ability to play for free, even without an Internet connection are waiting for you.

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: The White Room 5
description: The White Room 5 is the fifth sequel of an adventure escape game with a cartoon art style. Find objects that can help you escape the room and use your logic to solve the puzzles. Good luck!

title: Athena Match
description: Embark on a mythical journey in Athena Match, a Match 3 game set in Ancient Greece. Guided by the goddess Athena, match three or more identical artifacts to clear levels and uncover Greek secrets. Stunning visuals and rich soundscapes bring this world to life as you solve puzzles and overcome mythical obstacles inspired by Greek lore. Ready to prove your skills? Join Athena and dive into the adventure!

title: Sprunki Jigsaw Puzzle
description: Sprunki Jigsaw Puzzle is a fun jigsaw puzzle game. You can select one of the fifteen images and then select one of the four modes (16, 36, 64 and 100 pieces). Select your favorite picture and complete the jigsaw in the shortest time possible! Have fun and enjoy!

title: Guess The Drawing
description: This is a casual puzzle game where you draw and I guess. Maybe you've played a game like that before, where someone draws on your back and you draw on the front, and then you see if you agree. If you like that kind of game, then this game is for you. In this game, you need to memorize what the person behind you draws.You can use the coins you get to buy the brushes you need. Come and experience this new and interesting game world.

title: Ninja Spell Match
description: Ninja Spell Match is a fast-paced blend of match-3 puzzling and ninja action. Connect tiles to charge up your attacks and unleash devastating moves against waves of enemies. With each level, the challenge grows tougher as you fight your way through 30 unique stages packed with traps, puzzles, and rival ninjas. Think fast, match smart, and strike hard—your reflexes and strategy are the only way to survive.

title: Block Color Puzzle Blast
description: Immerse yourself in the explosive fun of Block Color Puzzle Blast, a thrilling puzzler where strategic block placement is key. Drag and drop vibrant blocks to fill gaps, unleash combos to earn massive scores, and experience the satisfying blast as completed lines clear the board, challenging you to reach new heights in colorful puzzle mastery.

title: Idle Merge Car And Race
description:
An addictive idle car merging game. Build your own car racing company and grow your business.
Move your cars to the racing track and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new cars (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level cars to upgrade into a new type. The better the cars, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster! Become the richest in the world in this idle merge car game.

title: Rescue Rift
description: Embark on a heart-pounding mission in "Rescue Rift," an intense and immersive action-adventure game that challenges your tactical skills and courage. As an elite operative of an undercover rescue team, you find yourself thrust into the depths of danger as you attempt to save hostages who have been kidnapped and confined within the eerie confines of an old, abandoned hospital.

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Tsunami Race
description: Have you ever faced the thrill of escaping a giant tsunami? In this action-packed game, you’ll choose from a variety of unique characters and race to stay ahead of your opponents. The game offers three exciting modes: outrun a tsunami in Tsunami Race, dodge flying fruits in Fruit Run, and slide to glory in Water Slides—knocking down opponents and collecting boosters along the way. Only the fastest and most strategic players will emerge as champions!

title: Mojicon Spring Connect
description:
The 5th Mojicon game is here! Relax and enjoy the peaceful Spring season. Guided by your cheerful and cheeky Bunny companion, embark on a soothing puzzle journey to bring a barren landscape back to life. Match tactile spring tiles to clear the board and earn rewards!

Restore the Meadow: Follow a heartwarming story.
Collect Cards: Find 34 beautiful "Spring Wisdoms".
Relax: Enjoy classic tile-matching mechanics.
Achievements: Go for 100% completion!

title: Match 3D Puzzle Saga
description: Ready to match and collect? Solve puzzles to earn coins, unlock powerful power-ups and complete daily challenges to grab extra rewards and sweet bonuses. The more you play, the more opportunities you have to boost your score!

title: Archery Master - Bow and Arrow
description:
Join archery adventure and become a bowmaster! Aim, shoot and hit the bullseye!

Pick your bow, defeat other archery masters and don’t let them take you down! Join in this fun and challenging adventure and have fun. Bow masters can really challenge your casual game skills but have no fear! If you enjoy bow and arrow games, then prepare to defeat other bow masters, earn coins, score, and become the ultimate bow master!

title: Home Pin 1
description: Welcome to Home Pin: Pull Pin Loot Puzzle , you will play as Edward, the man who just moved into an abandoned house. Use your wisdom to help Edward defeat villains, save his wife, collect money and build the house. Only with your brain can you help him turn his abandoned house into the dream’s home of Edward's family.

title: Gym Muscle Merge Tycoon
description: Gym Muscle: Merge Tycoon is an addictive game where you create your team of fighters and transform them into real muscle heroes. Connect fighters to strengthen their muscle mass, improve their characteristics, and earn profit. Participate in fighting tournaments to compete for cool rewards and become the most powerful fighter of all time!

title: Dreamy Jewel
description: If you put three or more jewel of thesame type together vertically or horizontally, they'll disappear! Special blocks appear when four or more are aligned and erased. Mixing effects when special blocks are crossed with each other!

title: Gun Clone
description:
A free browser game Gun Clone in the arcade and runner genre about cloning guns. Upgrade your weapons, collect cards. The game for girls and boys. The game is endless and pay attention, the levels are simple, but there are also very difficult ones! 
Take weapons and destroy everything in your path! By collecting various bonuses, more and more destructive weapons appear in your hands.

title: Phone Case DIY Run
description: Phone Case DIY Run is a very fun simulation game. What type of phone case do you have now? If you are interested in making a phone case, then come and join us to learn about the process! Collect the models, choose your favorite color for painting, then paste the picture and choose the pendant. Finally, the more phone cases you collect when you reach the end, the more money you get. Have fun!

title: Car Service Tycoon
description: Car Service Tycoon is a fun game designed for car enthusiasts. Open your own garage and start with a large collection of vehicles. In the game, you can fix the engines, repair brake systems, and fix electrical problems to get the vehicles ready for the road again. There's also the option to customize the exterior of the vehicles; you can change the paintwork, modify the rims and upgrade the exhaust systems.

title: Idle Farm
description:
Run your own successful farm and build an empire! The more you grow and harvest, the more money you get!
Use the money to upgrade your fields and make harvesting even more effective at producing food. Keep an eye on your production - with careful planning you’ll achieve everything! Expand your farm further and further until you truly own an empire.
Hire farm managers to do most of the work for you. Use their help to expand your farming empire, plant new crops and produce even more food!

title: Doomsday Tower Defense
description:
Survive the zombie apocalypse in this fast-paced 2D top-down tower defense game. Construct and upgrade various defensive turrets to take down hordes of undead attackers.

Earn coins by killing zombies and use them to purchase new towers, upgrade existing ones, or sell for cash and reinvest into a different turret.

Defend your base from waves of shambling corpses as you fight to stay alive in a world gone mad.

title: Roller Coaster Rush
description:
Speed through tracks in Roller Coaster Rush! Play free and online in this thrilling coaster game.

Roller Coaster Rush is an exhilarating 3D game that puts you in control of a speeding roller coaster. Your goal is to accelerate through the tracks without crashing, performing crazy jumps and navigating steep drops. Hold to speed up and release to slow down just in time. Each level challenges your timing and precision as you rush through colorful and thrilling environments.

title: Hoop Rivals
description: Hoop Rivals flips the court on its head! In this fast-paced arcade battler, you are the hoop—spinning, bouncing, and racing to catch the ball before your rivals do. Face off against up to 5 players in chaotic, high-flying matches where only the fastest hoop wins!

title: Obby vs Zombies
description: Obby vs Zombies is an innovative, fun-filled action game that captivated the gaming world. It challenges players to create mazes of different characters to fend off hordes of incoming zombies. The wide variety of options for attack and defense make this a highly strategic game with lots of replay value.

title: Digital Circus Find The Differences
description:
Step into the whimsical and wacky world of Digital Circus: Find The Differences, where fun meets challenge! Explore vibrant and surreal circus scenes filled with unique characters and zany details, all while sharpening your observation skills. Can you spot the subtle changes between two seemingly identical pictures?
Put your eyes to the test and discover how many differences you can find in this exciting puzzle adventure!

title: Patterns
description: Help Ellie recreate magical patterns using grass, fire, clouds, and more elements as you uncover the hidden order of each level.

title: Zombie Derby Pixel Survival
description: Zombie Derby Pixel Survival has never before been the destruction of zombies so bright, dynamic and fun. Take a new look at the world of the zombie apocalypse. Never before has killing zombies been so vibrant, dynamic and fun.

title: Hospital Inc
description: Step into the fast-paced world of Hospital Inc, an exciting management simulator. This addictive idle tycoon casual game lets you build, expand, and manage your own hospital while earning profits even when you're away.

title: Dino Slide
description: A puzle slide game wher you have to feed Dino. Move Dino with the keyboard arrow or swipe. Each level you have to complete the goal that consist in eating fruits and vegetables.

title: Candy Rain 5
description: Get ready for a delightful and vibrant match-3 experience with Candy Rain 5! The beloved Candy Rain series continues with even more sugary fun and challenging puzzles to enjoy.

title: JUMPER
description:
Bounce your way to record-breaking heights in JUMPER! Dodge epic traps, collect unique power-ups, and enjoy upgraded visuals as you climb higher and higher.

Unlock adorable skins and earn achievements as you master your jumps. Whether you're aiming for the top or just chilling, JUMPER offers a relaxing platform-hopping experience packed with charm.

title: Hidden Objects Story
description: Every scene tells a story, waiting for your discovery. Collect coins, unlock hints and piece together secrets buried beneath the surface. The mystery deepens with every level. Stay focused or the secrets slip away forever.

title: Troll The Teacher
description:
Laugh and prank the teacher in this fun school game!

Have you ever dreamed of playing a prank on your teacher? Now you have a chance! In this game, you will become a student who arranges funny pranks right during the lesson. Use the most unexpected "tools", upgrade them and watch the funny reactions of the teacher!

title: Rough Ball
description: Bounce wildly in Rough Ball! Control your cute purple ball across wall-to-wall platforms, dodging spikes, skulls, and deadly drops. Collect shiny coins, unlock free burger skins, and conquer chaotic levels. Don't fall down—jump, roll, and thrive in pixel-perfect adventure!

title: Italian Brainrot Quiz
description: Italian Brainrot Quiz is a chaotic meme-guessing game where you match bizarre names to iconic brainrot characters! From Tralalero Tralala to Bombardiro Crocodilo and Tung Tung Tung Sahur – can you guess them all? Each round is a wild ride through surreal Italian meme culture. Laugh, confuse your friends, and become the ultimate Brainrot Champion. Spaghetti logic guaranteed. Ready to play?

title: SPRUNKI 3D Escape
description: Sprunki Phase 10 lets players experiment with various musical elements represented by characters, each producing sounds like beats, melodies, or effects. Players create original compositions or follow sequences by combining these elements to unlock special musical bonuses. This edition in the Sprunki series adds new layers, making it a refreshing iteration for fans of the music-mixing genre.

title: Save the Daddy
description:
Get ready to unlock a world of tricky puzzles and brain teasers in Save the Daddy. Each level is unique and carefully designed to challenge your mind and test your IQ. Pull the pin in the right order and help the man escape from dangerous monsters & obstacles safely and thoughtfully.
Play each level very cautiously by analyzing your move before pulling the pin. As you progress, levels increase in difficulty which will make you game challenging and earn more rewards.

title: Merge Heroes Titans
description:
In this game, you will command squads of melee fighters and ranged archers fighting against waves of enemies. Your agility and strategic thinking will give you an edge to victory.

Unlock new powerful fighters and accurate archers by combining those available for purchase. Place them on the map according to abilities and win.

You will have to discover not only new characters, but also beautiful different worlds, enjoy our new game.

title: Room Sort
description: Welcome to Room Sort - Floor Plan Game, the ultimate free puzzle game that combines the fun of tangram puzzles with the creativity of home design. In this engaging game, you’ll rearrange room blocks to complete floor plans. Each room connects through doors, so you'll need to place them perfectly to create a cohesive layout.

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Simple baseball game with fun, cartoony players and easy one-click controls. It’s fast to learn and fun to play!

Unlike other baseball games, the action doesn’t stop after you hit the ball. You need to decide when to run, move to the next base, and try to score runs. It’s all about timing and quick decisions.

Pick one of the best baseball countries and try to win the championship. The game keeps the excitement of baseball but with simple rules, so anyone can enjoy it.

title: Ballpoint
description: Ballpoint is a fascinating Arkanoid game in which you have to shoot balls from a cannon and hit all the targets. Colorful backgrounds, varied levels, many variations of levels and bonuses. Try to pass all levels!

title: Last Stand Warrior
description:
A thrilling third-person shooter where you play as an experienced shooter defending your land from endless hordes of enemies. Control the hero, apply precise punches, use skills and fight with waves of mobs to prevent them from breaking through. Upgrade your weapons and abilities to become a true defense champion!

Ideal for fans of dynamic gameplay, arcade battles and survival in the «wave of opponents» mode.

title: Brick Game Classic
description: Brick Game Classic is a classic Tetris online game. If you are a fan of classic games, then this game that has been popular for many years is just right for you. When any row or column is filled, it is eliminated. You can change the shape of the cubes before they fall to eliminate them quickly. You can also make them fall faster if you are satisfied with their shape.  Now join the world of fun games.

title: Satisdom
description: Step into the calm and quirky world of Satisdom — a game where every little task feels oddly satisfying. Whether you're dragging, tapping, sorting or matching, each level is a chance to relax and have fun. Designed to run smoothly on both phones and computers, Satisdom is the perfect escape for anyone who loves simple pleasures and playful puzzles. Slow down, enjoy the details, and let yourself get lost in the fun.

title: Code Maze
description: Master programming logic with Code Maze! Use code blocks to navigate mazes, overcome obstacles, and reach goals. Each level challenges your problem-solving skills. Ready to code your way out?

title: Park Town
description: Park Town is a captivating match-3 puzzle game where you restore a neglected city park to its former beauty. Solve exciting puzzles, decorate to your heart’s content, and fill the park with adorable animals from across the globe.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sushi Break Dash
description: Sushi Break Dash is a casual game where you shoot the sushi blocks to break them. The more blocks you break, the higher your score.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Heist Defender
description: "Heist Defender" immerses players in the heart-pounding world of high-stakes bank robberies, where they take on the role of an elite security expert tasked with preventing a daring heist. As the mastermind behind the bank's defense systems, players must employ strategic thinking, quick reflexes, and cutting-edge technology to thwart the cunning thieves and protect the bank's vault from being plundered.

title: Maze Escape Toilet Rush
description: What's the most urgent situation you can imagine? Of course, it is the last second of finding a toilet. In Maze Escape: Toilet Rush, you'll have a nervous and hilarious maze escape. Each level is a brand-new maze. You need to find the best route to the toilet quickly. Use your logic and intelligence to reach your destination successfully.

title: Funny Shooter 2
description: Funny Shooter 2 is a fun FPS game where you fight hordes of absurd enemies! Use various weapons to slay these bizarre beings and upgrade your weapons arsenal as you progress.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bomb Evolution Runner
description: Blast enemies and defeat powerful bosses.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fun Ragdoll Challenge!
description: Fun Ragdoll Challenge! Mini Games Collection!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pirate Paradise
description: Pirate Paradise is a fun and relaxing game where you have to match three identical items in a row. Help the pirates sort the items into portals. The difficulty of the game will gradually increase and there will be more and more items.

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Paws Off My Clues!
description:
Explore unique locations filled with hidden objects and unexpected mysteries. From sunny beaches to the ancient ruins of Persia, every corner of this fluffy world comes to life as you hunt for hidden treasures.

Watch as the cats go about their lives, adding charm and humor to the atmosphere, while you search through their delightful mess. Solve puzzles, progress through levels, and become the ultimate hidden object master!

title: Hexon Rush
description:
Hexon Rush is a time limited puzzle game with a little bit of sci-fi look.

Main goal in the Hexon Rush is connecting all the lines inside the hexagonal tiles before time runs out.  There are 600 levels with increasing size, difficulty and complexity.

Don't worry, you will have two types of helpers to solve these puzzles. Be careful when you spend them because they are hard to obtain.

title: Snow Rider Obby Parkour
description:
Snow Rider Obby Parkour is a fast-paced snowboard adventure where reflexes, timing, and control matter. Play solo or with a friend in split-screen mode and experience different snow challenges across multiple game modes. Whether you want to beat distance records, explore a massive open world, or race down dangerous mountains, this game offers a complete snowboarding experience.

Master your snowboard, perform double jumps, and unlock amazing gear to customize your character!

title: Soda Block Jam
description:
Slide soda crates, collect bottles, and deliver to the right
exits. A smooth, colorful puzzler that blends motion and
color-matching

title: Moto Stunt Biker
description: More than twenty-four thrilling levels await you in Moto Stunt Biker, an adrenaline-pumping motocross game. Choose from four enthralling motorbike designs as you unlock them. In each level, you'll encounter new obstacles while earning cash to purchase and improve your motorcycles. Fans of racing and adrenaline seeking will like its captivating gameplay and colorful cartoon graphics. Get your heart racing because you're in for some wild races and daring exploits.

title: Hide Ball
description: Hide Ball is an addictive puzzle game where your mission is to protect the red ball from dangerous spiky enemies. Use the given blocks to build a safe shelter and hide the ball. Each level brings a new challenge — the constructions become trickier, and the enemies more relentless. Plan your moves, create a solid defense, and save your little hero!

title: Horror Tale
description: Horror Tale Kidnapper is a frightening first-person horror adventure game. Solve the disturbing mystery of the missing children at Lakewitch.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Mine Shooter 2: Noob vs Mobs
description: Mine Shooter 2: Noob vs Mobs is a frantic 3D FPS where a clueless Noob takes on waves of blocky mobs and nightmare beasts. Grab wild weapons, blast creepers and zombies, and use TNT for explosive crowd control.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Warfare 1917
description: Warfare 1917 is a fun game of strategy, tactics and war. You are a military general in World War I, and it is your duty to command your troops and lead them to victory.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Maze Cube 2048
description:
Dive into a world of challenging puzzles that test your strategic skills!
Become a true maze master! To conquer each level, you must carefully think ahead and plan your moves. The puzzles start easy, but watch out each new maze brings a greater challenge.

title: Baseball Pro
description: Baseball Pro is a sports game to become a pro baseballer and hit all the incoming ball to get high scores! Developer Code This Lab made this game.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Scandinavian Mahjong
description: Scandinavian Mahjong is a delightful twist on the classic game, set in a charming Scandinavian-inspired home reminiscent of IKEA. With 365 levels, each representing various objects or concepts, from horoscope signs to letters of the alphabet, immerse yourself in this cozy winter edition for hours of relaxing fun.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Idle Superpowers
description: Idle Superpowers is a roguelike idle RPG in which you become a hero with various superpowers to defeat your countless enemies!  Release Date December 2020  Developer Idle Superpowers is made by Luts91.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bit Gun.io
description: Bit Gun.io is a fast-paced multiplayer FPS where you test your tactical skills in intense 5v5 battles. Customize your arsenal, master unique weapons, and climb the ranks in thrilling PvP combat.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sandbox Island War
description: Get ready for a wonderful pixel battle in Pixel Island War! This strategy game brings you to a wonderful pixel world. Here your task is to conquer islands and expand your empire. Build bases, gather resources and prepare for fierce battles on different islands. For example, choose an island to place humans on. Humans will build towns and multiply. Choose sheep to produce wool and meat.

title: Capybara Block Drop
description:
Capybara Block Drop is a fast-paced, brain-teasing puzzle game where merging numbers and staying calm under pressure is the key to survival.

Drop numbered blocks into columns, combine matching tiles, and clear space with big combos.
But watch out, if the board fills up, it’s game over, and your capybara buddy might just lose his cool!

With colorful visuals and satisfying number-merging mechanics, Capybara Block Drop delivers endless strategic fun wrapped in a charming, lighthearted package.

title: Sneaker Art
description: Sneaker Art is a creative casual art game where you become a pro sneaker designer. Grab your paintbrush, unleash your imagination, and craft unique shoe designs. Choose from a variety of laces, showcase your artwork, and sell your masterpieces in your sneaker shop. Pack your custom sneakers in stylish boxes and grow your business with every sale!

title: Perfect Shot
description:
Step into Perfect Pocket, a unique puzzle game inspired by classic pool, but with a twist – you only get one shot to clear each level! Test your aim, plan your angles, and pocket all balls in a single move. 
Game Highlights :- 
One-Shot Levels: Every level challenges you to pocket all balls with just one shot. 
Realistic Physics: Feel the true motion and collision of balls. Many Unique Levels: Each with different layouts and increasing difficulty.

title: Barry's Prison Escape!
description: Barry's Prison Break is a fun adventure packed with obby challenges, tasks, boss fights, and exciting locations.Your mission is to escape from Barry's new maximum security prison.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Trap Craft
description: Trap Craft is a defense game where there is a hacker who is ready to fulfill any desire of a Princess, Noob, Pro, Herobrine, and the rest if they want to play a game that the hacker prepared. The game is to protect the portal from the zombies' attack.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: College Girls Team Makeover
description: Try our new fashionista app "College Girls Team Makeover". Here you can dress up 5 high school best friends. They are the most popular school girls and always together. This high-intensity game requires you to stay sharp, aim true, and master the art of drone attacks to outwit and overpower your opponents.

How to Play Amazing Strange Rope Police Vice SpiderYou can choose to become a superhero and save the day, or you can be the bad guy and become a supervillain instead!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Same Game
description: Same Game is a free puzzle game where you match two or more blocks of the same color to clear them. When you clear a section of the same color, the blocks below fall up to fill their place.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Catch Brainrots From Bosses
description: How many Brainrots can you steal? Remember, do not anger the Brainrot guarding the base.

title: Bubble Shooter Aura
description:
Bubble Shooter Aura brings a fresh, glowing twist to the classic bubble-shooting experience.
Enter a world of soft colors, smooth animations, and relaxing “aura” effects as you match and pop bubbles to clear levels and reach high scores.

Perfect for both casual players and bubble shooter fans, this game offers intuitive controls, satisfying gameplay, and a modern look that feels calm, fun, and addictive.

description: Two beautiful princesses, Eliza and the Little Mermaid, are waiting for your help in creating the perfect images for practicing Quadrobics. First, create a gentle but expressive makeup for each of the girls and put your hair in a comfortable hairstyle. Then choose dresses, jewelry and accessories. But the adventures don't end there! Complete the look by putting masks in the form of adorable animals on the princesses. After all, this is a mandatory part of the Quadrobics trend!

title: Looper
description:
Looper is a joyous and melodious music game that tests your sense of rhythm and timing. Get ready to start tapping your way through a colorful universe of beats and melodies! With hundreds of unique levels, Looper is the perfect game to soothe your puzzling needs.

As you progress, the constellations become more complex, and the beats more satisfying. But be warned, mistiming a tap could lead to an epic crash and burn - so make sure to bring your A-game!

title: Stickman Zombie 3D
description: You are a lonely stickman. Shoot and eliminate zombies and other stickman enemies!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

description: Knots Jam: Thread Puzzle 3D is a captivating puzzle game that blends the charm of embroidery with mind-bending challenges. Untangle vibrant threads, create intricate patterns, and let your creativity shine.

genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Dusty Maze Hunter
description:
Dusty Maze Hunter beckons you to a distinctive maze adventure, blending puzzle-solving with strategic gameplay.

Tailored for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, it promises an exhilarating journey through labyrinthine rooms filled with diverse obstacles. As you progress through multiple levels, you'll have the chance to refine your problem-solving skills and strategic thinking.

Are you prepared to unleash your strategy and triumph over the dust? The maze adventure awaits!

title: Nuts & Bolts: Screw Glass Puzzle
description: Nuts & Bolts: Screw Glass Puzzle is a puzzle game where you match screws to their corresponding colored boxes. If no match is found, the screws go into a hole.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Grandma Recipe Ramen
description: It's time to serve a delicious Ramen! Ask grandma for the recipe. Prepare the tools and gather the ingredients. Mix the ingredients perfectly, then decorate the Ramen. Keep following grandma's instructions to finish making the Ramen! Don't forget to dress up in various cute costumes. Making Ramen has never been more fun!

title: Drift Tycoon

title: Bomb Head Hot Potato
description:
In the game "Bomb Head - Hot Potato" your goal is to stay alive and not die from the bomb in your hand. Drop bombs on your opponents to win! 
Immerse yourself in the exciting world of "Bomb Head - Hot Potato" and prove your survival skills and tactical thinking!

title: Dolphin Olympics
description: Dolphin Olympics is an awesome game of skill in which you must control and acrobatic dolphin and try to perform a variety of cool tricks! You only have a time limit of two minutes and within this time limit you must rack up a high score by trying out different tricks and landing them successfully.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack
description: Bubble Shooter Candy Wheel Level Pack is a fun and challenging game where you shoot candy bubbles to match three or more on a rotating wheel. Use power-ups like the Bomb to blast nearby candies and the Stopwatch to freeze time for unlimited moves. Earn coins by clearing levels and use them to unlock more exciting levels. With increasing difficulty and sweet rewards, this game promises endless fun. Spin, aim, and conquer the candy wheel!

title: Drop Some Fruits
description: Drop Some Fruits is a fun and relaxing merge game where you control an adorable cat dropping fruits from above. Your goal is to expand your fruit collection and earn points to unlock customizations for your cat.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Leap and Avoid 2
description: Get ready for another thrilling journey with the white ball! "Leap and Avoid 2" brings new caves, lab levels, and fresh mechanics. Discover secret paths, collect coins, and unlock powerful bonuses like speed boosts and shields. Jump on white platforms, avoid black ones, and explore in all directions to find exits. The more coins you gather, the higher you rank. Compete with friends and uncover every hidden treasure!

title: Moto X3M

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

description: Take Photo is a captivating simulation game where you embark on a global adventure to capture stunning photos of various objects on the map. Navigate diverse environments and take pictures that perfectly frame each target to complete your objectives.

Build powerful runs through upgrades, ultimates, and synergies, then invest your rewards into permanent progression to push deeper with every attempt.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Kaleidoscope
description: Kaleidoscope is an online drawing tool to create your own amazing kaleidoscope shows or still images. You can also save and load your project easily!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Nightmare Couple Halloween Party
description: Nightmare Couple Halloween Party is a spooky and stylish dress-up game where you can help the ultimate nightmare couple prepare for their eerie Halloween bash. Select from a variety of creepy costumes, haunting accessories, and makeup styles to give the couple their perfect spine-chilling look. Unleash your creativity and fashion sense to make this Halloween party an unforgettable one for the nightmare couple!

title: Spaces Solitaire
description: Use spaces to arrange all cards in suit and in sequence from 2 to King. You can move a card to a space or empty spot if it is the same color and 1 higher in value than the card to the left of the space.

title: Evolution Factor
description: Evolution Factor is a revamped throwback where you command utility vehicles to rescue and restore a fleet of classic and work machines. Tow broken-down cars to the garage, build stunt zones with forklifts and excavators, and craft your own chaotic playgrounds across two detailed scenes.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Piggy Clicker
description: Piggy Clicker is a classic Clicker game, where you get to have Piggy as your pet and trough clicking buy him toys and such

title: M5 City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Prism Match 3D
description:
Enter a dazzling 3D world of colorful prism cubes and test your mind like never before. 
 Immersive 3D Graphics – Rotate, zoom, and explore beautifully crafted levels full of hidden tiles.
 Addictive & Relaxing – Easy to learn, hard to master. Balance logic, timing, and focus to win.
 Endless Challenges – Progress through creative stages that keep the fun fresh and engaging.
 Think & Unwind – Relax your mind while sharpening memory, observation, and problem-solving skills.

title: Think to Escape 3
description: Think to Escape 3 is an escape game set on a sinking ship. There are 3 levels available that you need to finish to save yourself.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Granny Pills - Defend Cactuses
description:
2075 year. After the invasion of aliens, there was almost no life and oxygen left on Earth. The only plant that survived are cacti. The aliens want to destroy or steal all the cactuses to stop the live on Earth.

The brave Granny who grows her cactuses on the road (so that they can receive rays of light) should protect them from aliens. She discovered that the aliens are afraid of human pills, and she has a huge amount of them, as well as a shotgun loaded in case of emergency.

title: The Queen's Jewels
description: The Queen’s Jewel is a charming matching game where precision meets sparkle. You’ll strategically align glittering gems and watch them tumble, slide, and collide under realistic physics.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: QBlock Puzzle Blast
description: QBlock Puzzle Blast is an addictive block game for fans of puzzles, jigsaw, and classic wooden blocks. Play QBlock Puzzle Blast 10 minutes a day, keep your mind sharp!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Rhino Rush Stampede
description: Rhino Rush Stampede is an endless running game with cool power-ups, epic upgrades, and cartoonish graphics. Collect delicious fruit and run for as long as you can!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Garage Master - Nuts and Bolts
description:
Your goal as a Garage Master is to sort out nuts by color to corresponding bolt. Sounds easy, doesn't it? Think twice! The color sort game presents a challenges by mixing all the nuts and making it difficult to find the corresponding bolt.
It’s a perfect time to train your problem-solving abilities in this color sort game.
The best part is when your car is finished, open my super garage and customize it by choosing one of 4 skins.

title: MineBlocks 3D Maze
description: MineBlocks 3D Maze: A Mind-Bending Adventure in a Blocky World! Get ready to step into a world of puzzles and creativity with MineBlocks 3D Maze—an incredible game that’s perfect for kids and adults alike. If you’re a fan of brain-teasers and enjoy a good challenge, this 3D puzzle game is exactly what you need. It’s all about strategy, logic, and a little bit of muscle (virtual, of course)!  Push the blocks strategically to guide them onto the altars scattered across the level.

title: Pixel Path
description:
Pixel Path is a platformer with a non—standard plot.?
Get to the portal at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem... The floor may collapse, the spikes will move on you, and your character will grow to huge sizes. One wrong step and the game is over.❌
You will have to keep your sanity, expect surprises, show a good reaction and most importantly: do not get angry.?
The game also has a table of the best players who completed all levels faster than the rest.

title: Paint Room Escape
description: Paint Room Escape is a puzzle escape game where creativity is key to finding your way out of a room with four walls, a desk, a shelf, an air conditioner, a safe, and a locked door. The only way out is to problem-solve your way to freedom by solving riddles using colors, paints, and painting tools that can be found throughout the room.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sweety Ludo
description: Sweety Ludo is a charming blend of the traditional Ludo game with adorable 2D visuals. Challenge friends or global players in exciting multiplayer matches to collect candies and reign supreme!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Find The Cow
description: Find The Cow is a minimalist grid-based deduction game where your goal is to find all the hidden cows while following strict logical constraints. Each row, each column, and each color zone must contain exactly one cow, and no two cows can be neighbors.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Ultrahero Vs Monsters Royale Battle
description: Ultrahero Vs Monsters Royale Battle is an action fighting game where you, as a mighty Ultrahero. Battle against waves of evil monsters in a 3D world. Every battle is a new adventure. Feel the perfect fusion of tower defense and nervous arcade action in this game. As a hero, you must not only fight off monsters in epic battles but also use tower defense tactics to protect your base.

title: Landmine Cube
description: In Landmine Cube you will you will take the role of a rolling cube that has to collect all the jewels in each level, without step on the landmines scattered around the floor. Every time you step on one of them, you will lose a life. If you lose all the lives, you will have to restart the level from the ground up. Do not worry, the Cube knows when a landmine is near, and it will start to glow boldly. Try your best and complete all the 21 levels of this engaging puzzle game!

title: BlockBuster Puzzle
description: BlockBuster Puzzle is a Tetris-like game where you match colorful blocks so they disappear from the game screen. Unlock new realms and challenges as you progress, enjoying vibrant graphics and immersive gameplay.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Wizard.io

title: Quiz Master
description:
Quiz Master is a fast-paced casual quiz game where you race against the clock—and other players—to prove you’ve got the wittiest brain in town.
Each match drops you into a question showdown spanning everything from pop culture and geography to brain-rot challenges.
When you answer a question correct you get 1 Block that will save you. If you pick the wrong answer you will stay where you are.
The water rises so make sure to answer correctly or you get eaten by the sharks.

title: Guess The Italian Brainrot Animals
description: Get ready for a wild and hilarious ride with Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals, a fast-paced, emoji-fueled trivia game that tests your knowledge of 64 iconic Italian Brainrot characters! From the most famous to the obscure, this game challenges you to guess the correct character based on three emoji clues before the timer runs out. Think you’re a Brainrot expert? Prove it!

title: Resource Clicker
description: Resource Clicker is an addictive game where you collect resources by clicking and building mines. Discover new locations, uncover secrets, and advance in resource mining.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Eat Donuts
description: Swap, rotate, and smash colorful donut rings in a vibrant 3x3 grid to create explosive matches and devour points like never before. Start with easy levels like our sunny beachside challenge—rack up scores to hit that juicy target of 800, earn shiny coins for power-ups like the mighty hammer smash or speedy rotates, and unlock endless waves of mouthwatering fun.

title: Associations - Word Connect
description: Associations - Word Connect is a clever word puzzle game that reimagines how you think about language. Instead of just forming words, you’ll discover the hidden relationships between them, linking ideas, concepts, and meanings in creative ways.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Taxi Rush
description: Taxi Rush is a driving simulation game where you race through city streets to deliver clients swiftly and safely. Navigate dense traffic, avoid roadblocks, and manage unique passenger demands to earn rewards.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fashion Battle for Survival
description: In this puzzle game you have to test your memory by guessing the cards in pairs. Each correctly guessed pair brings you closer to winning the game round. And each successfully completed round opens the doors to the world of fashion, allowing you to dress up the main character of the game - an Asian beauty with a daring character. Remember that the time to complete the round is limited by a timer.

title: Capy Merge: Animal Drop Puzzle
description: Capy Merge: Animal Drop Puzzle is a vibrant merging adventure where you combine quirky animals, from cheeky capybaras to adorable kittens, in strategic and entertaining ways. With nice animations, charming sound effects, and challenging mechanics to keep the container from overflowing, every move brings joy and laughter.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Word Duel
description: Word Duel is a 1v1 multiplayer word battle game. Features      Matchmaking in ONE global server: compete with people from all over the world     Compete in 5 different arenas: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert, Champion and win gold rewards     Free gold chest every 4 hours     10+ different styles of letter blocks, available for purchase with gold     Daily challenges to warm up your brain and earn gold rewards  Release Date September 2020 Developer Word Duel was made by Fish Pond Studio.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

description:

Innovative Puzzle Mechanics: Tackle a range of puzzles designed to test your problem-solving abilities. Each level offers a unique brain teaser, from classic logic challenges to cutting-edge new mechanics.

title: War of Mine
description: War of Mine is a captivating 2D side-camera game inspired by the iconic Minecraft theme, reimagined with unique gameplay mechanics and a strategic progression system. As a resourceful adventurer, you’ll embark on an epic journey through diverse maps and levels, battling waves of enemies in an auto-battle system where tactical preparation and smart upgrades are the keys to survival.

genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

Choose a unique combination of cards including various types of troops, defensive structures, enhancements, and tactical abilities to defeat your opponent in a series of five intense duels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Tower Defense Dragon Merge
description: Experience Tower Defense: Dragon Merge, a thrilling clash of strategy and chaos for hours of unique gameplay. Spin for PowerUps in the in-game shop, expanding your arsenal as you level up to combat invaders. In the frenzy of the alien assault, mash the cannon button for more firepower. Reinforce castle walls and fortify defenses through upgrades for a fighting chance against the relentless onslaught. Face the challenge, strengthen your defenses, and enjoy an exciting blend of strategy and chaos!

title: Jet Rush
description: Jet Rush is an awesome platform game with superb arcade-style gameplay. You control a high-tech jet plane, and you must pilot it through a series of challenging courses and obstacles.

description: Super Sucker 3D is a unique action game where you take control of a powerful vacuum to clear out enemies and obstacles. Suck up everything in your path, then unleash it to defeat bosses and advance through levels.

description:
​Tap the screen or click the mouse to drop the block. The goal is to stack blocks perfectly and build the highest tower possible. It requires timing and precision.
Stack the blocks as high as you can! Test your precision and timing in this addictive arcade game.

title: Medieval Battle 2P

title: Puzzle Masters: Travelers

Puzzle Masters Travelers is a relaxing and colorful jigsaw puzzle game where you assemble beautiful landscapes from dozens of pieces.
Travel across stunning locations around the world, unlock new sceneries, and enjoy the soothing atmosphere of discovery!
Use helpful boosters to finish each picture before the timer runs out. Challenge your focus, patience, and speed — and become a true puzzle master!

title: Tennis Masters
description: Tennis Masters is a competitive 1-on-1 tennis game in which you can play against a computer or a friend in 2 player mode. Collect different power-ups and funny transformations.

title: Happy Wheels
description: Happy Wheels is a side-scrolling ragdoll physics game. Navigate through the levels using one of several unique characters without being torn limb from limb.

title: Obby Parkour Racing
description:
Welcome to Obby Parkour Racing – the game where speed, agility, and style collide to create the ultimate racing challenge!

Jump, grind, and dodge through dynamic obstacle courses on your snowboard! Prove your mastery in a world where parkour isn't just on foot
it's on a board. Every race is a new test, and only the fastest and most agile champions will claim victory.

title: Smash Karts
description: Smash Karts is a 3D multiplayer IO kart battle game. Drive your go-kart, pick up weapons, and blow up other karts to win!

title: Dino Game
description: Play Dino Game online! An offline-style dinosaur run for 1–3 players. Jump cacti, dodge flyers, unlock dinos, and race for high scores. Dino Game brings the classic offline dinosaur run to life with fast, responsive gameplay and local multiplayer. Dash across an endless desert, jump over cacti, and duck under swooping dinos as the speed steadily climbs. Play solo to beat your personal best, or switch to 2-player and 3-player modes to race friends on the same device.

title: Bacteria
description: Bacteria is a casual game that lets you inject bacteria into creatures to create monstrous beings! Unleash your creativity as you experiment with different combinations and see what kind of monstrous results you can achieve.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: Pixel Apocalypse: Infection Begin
description: Pixel Apocalypse: Infection Begin is the first installment of the Pixel Apocalypse series – in this game you see where the devastating zombie infection begins! The zombies are approaching from all angles, and you must attempt to survive using a myriad of weapons.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: GT Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills?

title: Slice it Up
description: Slice It Up is a colorful arcade puzzle where precision is key! Cut fruits, toys, and other shapes exactly in half to earn stars. The closer your slice is to the center, the better your score. Simple controls, smooth animation, and bright graphics make every level fun and challenging. Test your reflexes, aim for three stars, and unlock new levels in this exciting game for all ages!

title: Death City Zombie Invasion
description: Death City: Zombie Invasion is a shooting horror game where you must fight off waves of zombies at every angle while completing task-driven quests. As the city falls into chaos, your mission is to uncover the cause of the apocalypse and fight to survive.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Gym Simulator - Tycoon
description: Welcome to Gym Simulator - Tycoon, where your business dreams take shape in the world of fitness. In this engaging online game, you'll manage and grow a network of gyms—upgrade your facilities, invest in top-notch equipment, and fine-tune every detail to run smoothly. Why don't you compete with your friends for points with the sharing function?

title: Fusion 2048
description: Fusion 2048 is an addictive puzzle game where you combine matching numbered blocks to reach higher values and aim for the elusive 2048 block. Play in Classic or Shape Mode, plan your moves to avoid filling the container, and use TNT blocks to clear space. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and score tracking, it’s perfect for quick sessions or long strategic runs—easy to pick up, hard to master.

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: Castaway
description: Castaway is a strategy RPG in which you play as a powerful warrior on a mysterious island.  Release Date May 2010  Developer Castaway was made by Likwid.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sword and Jewel
description: Sword and Jewel is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you place colorful gems on the board to create lines of three or more. Match gems in rows or columns to clear them, score points, and keep the board from filling up. Plan your moves carefully - when there’s no space left for new gems, the game ends!

title: Pushover 3D
description: Unleash your creativity in *Pushover 3D*! Draw unique curves to control your ragdoll fighter’s moves, launching them in unexpected ways to defeat opponents. Each match is a wild, physics-based showdown where every line transforms into unpredictable body motions. From wild spins to slingshot leaps, it’s all up to the patterns you create. Experiment, outsmart your rivals, and become a master of ragdoll combat!

title: Angry City Smasher
description: Angry City Smasher is a third-person RPG fighting simulation game with 3D-armed gorillas. Your goal is to defeat the enemy monster and destroy the marked number of buildings. Use the Ultimate Smash to make AOE damage and destroy more buildings with one hit. To be honest, it is necessary to defeat your opponent first because it will run to you on the level. No one wants to be disturbed by others. Good luck!

title: Get Ready With Me: Concert Day
description: Join us in the excitement as you follow the thrilling journey of teen Riri, who is preparing for the concert of a lifetime. From choosing the perfect outfit to applying stunning makeup, you'll get to walk her through all the steps of this beautifying process. But before you start the fun, be sure to help her customize her cowgirl hat, a signature item for the concert she will attend. Then go crazy with the makeup, dress her up in a jaw-dropping outfit, and accessorize for a complete look.

title: Jet Fighter Airplane Racing
description:
Are you a fan of car traffic games & street racing? Do you like planes and the sky? We have something new to play! Try a plane flying game with different missions, improve your flying skills and become a true professional in racing piloting in Jet Fighter Airplane Racing!

Are you looking for exclusive aeroplanes?
• MiG-21 “Fishbed"
• McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II
• MiG-29 “Fulcrum”
• F-16 Fighting Falcon
• MiG-31 BM “Foxhound”
• F-22 Raptor
• SU-35 “Flanker-E”
• SU-47 "Firkin"
• SU-57

title: Geometry Platformer
description: Geometry Platformer is a fast-paced, reflex-testing platformer where players guide a shape-shifting cube through a series of dangerous geometric obstacles. The game features sharp spikes, swinging hazards, and gravity-defying mechanics that challenge your timing and precision. The neon graphics and intense gameplay create a thrilling experience, requiring quick reactions and memorization of complex patterns.

title: Dead Faces Clone Online
description:
Dead Faces Clone Online is a horror, intrigue, investigation, and object collection game in a 3D game in the dark horror category. You can play it for free in your favorite browser.

You will control the main character, who is in a building with many strange things that are happening. Investigate, follow the instructions to find the items, don't be afraid, and solve each of the levels of this game.

title: Bouncy Egg
description: Bouncy Egg is a physics-based puzzle game where you have to move the springs, platforms, conveyer belts, and more to get your egg into the basket. The game has 40 levels to challenge your brain.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fun Obby Extreme
description:
Are you ready to experience an extreme game Fun Obby Extreme is a 3D parkour type game, little Obby needs you to help him jump across the platforms and reach the goal of each level.

Explore a sprawling city, level up and unlock new equipment, all while honing your parkour skills along the way!

title: Space Company
description: For years man has dreamed of returning to space. As the head of a space exploration company, you must help realize this dream!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bubble Pop Fairyland
description: Bubble Pop Fairyland is a colorful bubble shooter where you aim, shoot, and pop bubbles to rescue trapped fairies. Match bubbles of the same color to clear the board and progress through charming puzzle-filled levels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: CleanUp.IO
description: Just like holey.io, this game allows you to grow bigger and eventually clean the entire map! Start by vacuuming small objects and make your way to victory.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Kour.io
description: Kour.io is a multiplayer IO FPS game that plunges you into intense battles across various maps with many guns and modes to play!It's one of the most accessible first-person shooters, available on both web browsers and mobile.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: 3D Flight Simulator
description: 3D Flight Simulator is an ultra-realistic flying game in our driving category in which you get to jump behind the controls of different types of aircraft. How to Play 3D Flight SimulatorThis game is all about learning the in-depth controls behind flying an airplane or even a helicopter.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: City Car Driving Simulator
description: City Car Driving Simulator is a realistic car simulation game that takes place at night in a beautiful city! You can create your own perfect ride by customizing the car's wheels and steering.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Number Tubes
description: Relax and train your brain with Number Tubes — the addictive number sorting and merging game! Tap to move balls, merge the same numbers into bigger ones, and keep going to beat your best score. No time limits, no pressure — just pure fun. Perfect for fans of merge games, number games, and classic sort puzzles.

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: Sniper 3D Zombie
description: Defend your position from the zombie invasion. You have a sniper rifle, find and eliminate zombies. Hitting a zombie is not difficult, it is much more difficult to detect it. The enemies are cunning and very well disguised, they are able to blend in with the environment. Shoot the zombies and take the first places in the leaderboard!

title: Starry Style Dorama of Dream
description: Welcome to an exciting journey into the world of Korean doramas heroes! Here you can become a stylist for two aspiring young film actors: a young actress whose heart beats to the rhythm of romantic stories, and a charismatic actor whose smile can melt even the coldest hearts. You will be able to choose from a variety of outfits, accessories and hairstyles, creating unique images that emphasize the individuality of your characters.

title: Offroad Muddy Trucks
description: Embark on a great adventure with huge trucks featuring massive tires and bodies in the Offroad Muddy Trucks game! You can play in either the 1 or 2 player career mode or explore a vast free map with a friend. The game offers surprises and entertaining terrain for you to discover. Let the monster truck simulator begin on muddy ground and experience all the various terrains on the map.

title: Pet Merge
description:
Merge adorable pets! 
Combine cute companions to unlock rare and magical species. 
Pass exciting levels in adventure mode or beat your high score in the classic mode.
Let's Play! Meow

title: Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle
description: Dive into the enchanting world of Bloom Sort 2: Bee Puzzle, where flowers bloom, bees buzz, and your mind gets a delightful workout! This unique 3D puzzle game combines stunning 2D and 3D graphics with a relaxing, chill vibe, making it the perfect escape for players of all ages.

title: Cyber Arrow
description: Play Cyber Arrow – a fast, fun online game where you become a Techno Archer! Fly a remote-controlled arrow, solve puzzles, defeat enemies, and rescue hostages across 3 exciting game modes in a stunning sci-fi world.

title: Russian Checkers
description:
Russian Checkers with computer, Online with real people or Together on same screen.
Game Modes:
- With a computer
- Online
- Online with a friend via the link
- Together on the same screen

title: My Castle. Merge & Story
description:
My Castle: Merge & Story is a relaxing merge 2 puzzle game set in a warm and atmospheric medieval world of renewal, mystery, and self-discovery. Merge items, restore and decorate an ancient castle, and follow the journey of a young princess who chooses a new path in life.
This calm offline merge adventure combines cozy gameplay, castle restoration, and a story about starting over — far from royal expectations, closer to one’s true self.
Restore and Decorate a Forgotten Castle

title: Ultimate Flying Car 2
description: Ultimate Flying Car 2 is the ultimate adventure driving game where you can drive, fly, and teleport with your supercars. Explore many different worlds with lots of new features in this second chapter of the game series!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Halloween Stickman 2
description: It's a continuation of Halloween Stickman story. The streets are alive with people in costumes, glowing jack-o'-lanterns, and the buzz of tricks waiting to unfold. You were set to enjoy a thrilling Halloween night until your sly friend Stickman, the master of mischief, pulled another one of his classic pranks and set you up again. Now, it’s up to you to turn the tables, use your wits, and punish the trickster in this spooky adventure!

title: Merge Blocks 2048 Style!
description: ● A game with a summer atmosphere! Compete with friends and colleagues?! In the game you have a playing area? where cubes fall and merge if they have the same number! Merge as many cubes as possible to make the biggest one, save up points?! Be the first on the leaderboard?! Play and relax ?!

title: Cat Life Simulator 3D
description: Cat Life Simulator is an adventure game where you experience life as a cat! Explore diverse locations, hunt animals, and complete quests for both animals and humans.

title: Sprunki Torches Maze
description: Light up all the torches in the room to unlock the door. Some torches are linked and will toggle together when activated. Watch out for bats! Contact with them results in a game over! Your goal is to exit the house through the front yard door.

title: Capture War
description: Capture War is an arcade game to recruit as many stickmen as you can so you'll have a strong team and win the final battle. Release Date February 2022 Developer Beaver Games developed this game.

title: Murderers VS Sheriffs Duels
description:
Love Roblox-style action games? Get ready for the ultimate showdown!

Jump into fast-paced 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, and 4v4 duels where every second counts. Play as a Murderer or a Sheriff, master unique abilities, and outplay your enemies in style.

If you enjoy games like Murder Mystery or Arsenal in Roblox, this is made for you!

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: Valentines Makeup Trends
description: If you're still seeking inspiration for your upcoming Valentine's Day look, then look no further Our social media influencers bring a selection of super sweet makeup looks that are going to impress your Valentine tonight. In the Valentine's Makeup Trends game for girls, you can discover the secrets of a sophisticated fantasy makeup look in candy colors. Play today and have fun!

title: Scroll and Spot
description: Experience the joy of the holidays with Scroll and Spot, a unique Christmas-themed puzzle game! Explore two beautifully crafted images as you scroll to uncover five subtle differences hidden within.The scrolling feature keeps both images perfectly aligned, making it a dynamic and immersive puzzle experience. Challenge your observation skills and celebrate the holiday spirit with every discovery!

title: Loop Farmer Idle
description: Loop Farmer Idle is a clicker game where you play as a young farmer who walks around his farm. Plant new vegetables and get as many coins as possible!

description: Bullet Fury 2 is an FPS game to eliminate all enemies that are guarding a laboratory and is a sequel to Bullet Fury. Release Date The game was initially released as a Flash game.

description: Stick your fork and climb to the top! Hold down to keep sticking the fork continuously. If your fork hits a hero or an obstacle, it’s game over! Stick the fork just above the falling hero’s feet to trigger a Super Jump and earn a high score!

title: Cornhole League - Board Games
description: Cornhole League is a thrilling twist on the classic backyard game where you aim, toss, and score your way to victory. Compete in intense matches, join tournaments, and showcase your flair with customizable boards and bags. Explore stunning venues, from cozy backyards to grand stadiums. Perfect your toss and rise to cornhole greatness!

title: Snake King
description: Get ready to slither your way to the top in this addictive take on the classic Snake game! As the Snake King, you’ll navigate through a maze-like arena, avoiding collisions with the four walls and your own tail.

description: Foreign Creature is a point-and-click game that lets you play as an alien that can take over the bodies of any living creature on earth. Use this transfer mechanic to free yourself from being a scientific experiment, then causing chaos everywhere you go!

title: Panda Mahjong Classic
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Art Salon
description: Welcome to Art Salon - Makeup & Nails, where your creativity knows no bounds! ? Whether you're passionate about fashion, beauty care, or just looking for a fun, relaxing game, this is the perfect app for you. From designing acrylic nails to creating stunning makeup looks, step into a world of endless beauty transformations in 3D! ??

title: Swap Color
description:
Swap Color – Fast Reflex Color Challenge!

Swap Color is a fast-paced arcade game that challenges your reflexes and coordination. In this colorful tap-to-match adventure, you must swap your shape's color to match the incoming obstacles and survive as long as you can!

Simple to play but hard to master, Swap Color is perfect for casual players looking for a thrilling, one-touch arcade experience that gets more intense with every second.

Players must carefully move the dropper to align and drop matching animals. When two of the same type collide, they merge into a higher-level animal. The goal is to keep merging and progressing to create new animals. Special buttons offer abilities like shaking the container or merging random animals, adding strategy and excitement to the gameplay.

title: College Girls Team Makeover
description: College Girls Team Makeover is a beauty game where you, as the stylist for five high school BFFs, you have full control over their appearance, from skin tone to wardrobe. With over 1000 clothing and accessory options, you can create diverse looks for each girl, whether it's a geeky chic or party-ready ensemble.

description: Bag Defense is an action-packed adventure where strategy and skill are key to survival! Carefully choose and manage your weapons, armor, and supplies to fend off relentless waves of monsters and defend your territory.

title: Cube Stack 2048
description:
Cube Stack 2048 is a highly addictive casual game inspired by the classic puzzle game 2048, but with exciting new gameplay!
Merge numbered cubes to double their value, reach 2048, or even higher! Try to make it to the end.
Explore tons of amazing and challenging levels by merging cubes, avoiding obstacles, and collecting money!

description: Explore global fashion in Back to School: Uniforms Edition! Customize your character with stylish outfits, accessories, and hairstyles inspired by each culture. Dive into the diversity of school uniforms and become a fashion expert while having fun!

title: Monster Merge
description: Monster Merge is a lighthearted strategy game where you fuse identical creatures to create stronger, funnier, and more fearsome monsters. Build your lineup, discover quirky new evolutions, and send your growing army into battle to crush enemies.

Create words in the English dictionary to score points. Drag and drop the tiles to form words.

Take advantage of bonus tiles such as double letter scores, triple word scores and more. How well-versed are you with the English vocabulary?
