description: Dream Pet Hotel is a charming connect puzzle game with an engaging hotel meta. Match tiles to clear levels, earn rewards, and unlock cozy rooms. Decorate and furnish spaces to create a unique style, then welcome adorable pets to stay in your hotel. Watch your collection grow as you design the perfect home for cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Relaxing, addictive, and fun to play online — build your dream pet hotel today!

title: Minesweeper Duel
description: Minesweeper Duel introduces a competitive twist to the classic puzzle game. Engage in intense one-on-one matches where players alternate opening cells, scoring points based on the value of the revealed cell.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Jelly Dash
description: Jelly Dash is a fast-paced multiplayer racing game where gooey, jelly-like characters swing, stretch, and dash to the finish line! With one-finger gameplay, it’s super easy to learn but packed with competitive action as you race against players worldwide.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Mysterious Familiars Enchanted Bestiary
description: Welcome to the magical world of Mysterious Familiars! Your task is to fill the magic vessel by simply tapping on the screen. Each click fills the potion bowl. As soon as the vessel is filled, a new image of one of the familiars or its next stage of maturation will open. Explore magical locations, from the Moonlight Glade to the Slug Trail, and watch incredible creatures appear from small drops of magic potion. Start the adventure right now - the familiars are waiting for you!

title: Guns vs Magic
description: Step into the shoes of Silvius, a courageous student of magic, as you fight to save the world from the dark powers unleashed by your former mentor, Lucius. Once a wise and benevolent wizard, Lucius has succumbed to the sinister influence of a cursed crystal, turning him into an evil sorcerer intent on dominating the world. Now, it's up to you to confront Lucius and his army of enchanted creatures in a battle of wits, power, and courage.

Unlock marked levels by completing 8 wraps. Use money to draw 8 different colors. Earn extra cash with 8 hands that boost your lipstick collection. The more lipsticks you gather, the more money you’ll make!

In this anime game you have to play the role of a girl who has a loving husband and a child under her heart, who is waiting for her birth. Take care of yourself, give birth, take care of your baby and raise a healthy baby.

In Story Mode, we have to unlock locked spaces by placing colorful puzzles in the right spots. In Time Attack Mode, we have to race against the clock to solve puzzles as quick as possible. Challenge yourself to master every stage with this fun puzzle game!

title: Hidden objects: Lost Island 2
description: Discover an immersive adventure on a lost island full of secrets, mysteries, and ancient artifacts. Together with a charismatic explorer, you’ll find yourself deep in tropical jungles where a forgotten temple of an ancient civilization lies hidden beneath overgrown vines and trees. Every location is a handcrafted scene packed with hidden objects, puzzles, and clues about the mysterious past.

In "Noob Ragdoll: Crazy Punch", you'll see the world from a unique perspective - through the eyes of the glove itself!

-First-person camera - Feel like you're delivering the punch yourself!
-Minecraft-style characters and vibrant action-packed scenes

Helping Little Duck
In this Skill Game help a charming little duckling to fall into the tub with water. Throw the water in the correct places so that the duckling falls directly into the tub. - Play Helping Little Duck Free and Enjoy!

title: Girlfriend from Hell
description: Girlfriend From Hell is a 2D arcade puzzle game where you help Miya unleash her fury on Haruto after a heartbreaking rejection. Set up traps using various objects, like toy balls or a sawed-through chair, to make Haruto's life miserable.

description: Pet Runner is a fast-paced platformer where your pet runs forward automatically, and you must jump, dodge obstacles, defeat enemies, and collect coins. Play in Endless Mode for infinite fun or tackle unique challenges in Level Mode. Use up to three lives, hit checkpoints, and complete daily challenges to earn coins. Unlock and customize adorable pets in the shop to enhance your adventure. With its exciting gameplay and charming rewards, Pet Runner offers fun for all ages!

Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.

One Hero: Dive into the ultimate action-packed shooting game! Play as a lone hero, dodging and shooting your way through waves of enemies. Eliminate all foes to claim victory. Are you ready to be the last one standing?

With intuitive controls and accessible gameplay, players of all skill levels can jump in and start unleashing chaos in no time.

Tank Challenge is an action-packed tank battle game that tests your reflexes and strategy. Play solo or challenge a friend in fast-paced matches.

Make quick decisions, aim carefully, and stay ahead to win. Smooth on mobile and desktop, easy to learn but challenging to master.

Enter the arena and fight for victory!

The Doggi is Adventure with Hidden Objects and Puzzles. Easy controls, simple game mechanics. Play to kill time and relax. The game doesn't require a super force and ability. This game won't bring you to hell and make you sweat. The game has hints.
The game performs in the genre of finding hidden objects with puzzles. The game has nice hand-drawn graphics. The player needs to help a little dog named Doggi collect all the hidden bones.

description: The city is under attack by dangerous zombies, and you must become a hero to save it! Awakened by a dream, you take on the mantle of a human warrior with unlimited potential, joining other survivors to fight against the evil horde. But with the zombies greatly outnumbering you, any mistake could lead to dire consequences. You must find a way to survive this crisis.

With over 2 billion visits, this game offers an immersive experience for fans of superheroes and tycoon-style gameplay.

Rediscover the captivating world of Solitaire Klondike!

Join the community of enthusiasts and prove your mastery in Klondike!

Keep an eye on the leaderboard and become the top player among all!

Your goal:
Inflict maximum damage and destroy your doll using everything at your disposal. Drop a car on his head, throw a rock at him, or throw him off a cliff. Every action triggers a reaction, so experiment with different ways to destroy. Sometimes there will be multiple dolls: twice the targets, twice the strategies!

Enter the captivating world of Energy Clicker and become a true master of electricity generation! You will take control of the main character who, by pressing the generator pedal, unleashes immense power and lights up the windows of the city. However, be careful because if the energy exceeds the permissible value, your generator will start to break down!
Become a leader in electricity generation and show everyone your energetic side in Energy Clicker.

Find pairs of beautiful travel-themed tiles that are free on at least one side and remove them to complete each level. As you progress, new layouts and challenges will keep the game fresh and engaging. Use the Hint feature whenever you get stuck, or watch a reward video to gain unlimited time and continue your puzzle-solving adventure.

From washing, styling hair and providing luxurious jewelry & makeup accessories, there's never a dull moment in this delightful game.

title: Eggy Car
description: Eggy Car is a simple yet challenging physics-based casual driving game where the goal is to drive as far as possible without letting the egg in your car fall off and crack! Controls are minimal, but finding the right balance between braking and accelerating is crucial, especially when navigating hills.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Parking Frenzy
description: Welcome to Parking Frenzy, the ultimate test of precision, planning, and timing! Forget everything you know about driving simulators—this game doesn’t need pedals, steering wheels, or complicated controls. Just swipe your finger, draw the perfect path, and let your car glide into the parking spot. With a stylish 3D look, dynamic environments, and intuitive gameplay, Parking Frenzy delivers a uniquely satisfying experience that’s easy to play and hard to master.

title: Bubble classic
description: The goal of the game is not to lose as early as possible and to score as many points as possible. Improve your accuracy thanks to very competent rolling of balls. The more blocks with balls you destroy, the more points you accumulate. Check your results in the world rankings, maybe you are already number 1.

title: The Idiot Test
description: The Idiot Test is the first instalment of this fun and entertaining game. In this game, you must progress through various levels of idiocy and prove that you actually have some mental brain power!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Neko Sliding: Cat Puzzle
description: Neko Sliding: Cat Puzzle is a delightful block puzzle game featuring playful cats. Slide the blocks to complete lines and unleash impressive combos.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: ZombieCraft
description: ZombieCraft is a third-person shooting game where you must survive the zombie wave. This game features intense zombie shooting in a vast blocky world.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hammer 2
description: Complete various missions while constantly shooting down enemies. Collect money and upgrades while doing so!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Xmas Hexa Sort
description:
Xmas Hexa Sort is a festive twist on the classic hexagon puzzle!
Move and place colorful stacks of blocks on the board to create perfect combinations and clear space. Relax, think ahead, and enjoy the cozy holiday atmosphere as you solve each cheerful puzzle!

title: Word Solitaire
description: Challenge your mind with a fresh twist on a classic with Word Solitaire! This addictive word solitaire blends clever word-building with strategic card gameplay, creating a unique solo experience. Find categories, reveal hidden words, and clear the board in increasingly challenging levels. Perfect for quick breaks or long sessions—relax, think, and master the art of words!
